catalog_content:
Item Name: Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder (8 oz - 1 Pack) – Gluten Free, Authentic Chicken Flavor for Soups, Stews, Marinades, Porridge, Seafood, and Seasoning WonTon Soups
Bullet Point 1: RICH CHICKEN FLAVOR – Made with USA raised chickens, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder delivers an authentic, savory chicken taste, perfect for enhancing a variety of dishes like soups, stews, and noodles.
Bullet Point 2: VERSATILE SEASONING – This chicken broth powder is ideal as a marinade, seasoning, or soup base. It adds depth to hot pot dishes, pasta, chicken-flavored rice, and cream sauces, making it a must-have for Asian cooking and everyday meals.
Bullet Point 3: CONVENIENT & EASY TO USE – Customers love the convenience of this bouillon powder, which easily dissolves into liquids for quick flavor boosts. It's perfect for home cooks looking for a fast and flavorful solution to elevate their dishes.
Bullet Point 4: ENHANCES ANY RECIPES – Whether you're making won ton soup, casseroles, or stir-fry, this chicken stock concentrate enhances any recipe with a rich, savory taste. It's a great alternative to chicken bouillon cubes and traditional chicken stock.
Bullet Point 5: LONG-LASTING – Packaged for freshness, this chicken bouillon maintains its rich flavor over time, making it a reliable staple in your kitchen.
Product Description: Made with chicken raised in the USA, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder delivers the authentic flavor of real chicken to elevate your cooking. Its rich, savory taste adds a delicious depth to a variety of dishes, making it an indispensable ingredient in any kitchen. Whether you're preparing soups, stews, casseroles, or congee, this versatile bouillon powder enhances your meals with the perfect balance of flavor. Ideal for marinades, seasoning, and as a soup base, Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder is perfect for seasoning meat, seafood, and vegetables. It’s a great addition to hot pot dishes, noodles, pasta, and chicken-flavored rice, infusing every bite with irresistible taste. Simply sprinkle it into your recipes for a burst of chicken flavor that elevates your meals to the next level. Use it to create creamy sauces or elevate your favorite recipes with ease. Crafted with high-quality USA chicken, this bouillon powder guarantees a premium cooking experience. Transform everyday meals into flavorful creations with Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder. Add Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon Powder to your pantry today and enjoy delicious, authentic flavor in every bite!
Value: 8.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A mid-range, internationally recognized brand offering a versatile, gluten-free bouillon powder with a focus on authentic chicken flavor. The metal can packaging suggests durability and long shelf-life, aligning with its claim of 'long-lasting' freshness. Positioned as a convenient, easy-to-use ingredient for home cooks, its premium ingredient claim (USA-raised chicken) may justify a slightly higher price than generic alternatives, while the lack of organic or specialty certifications keeps it in a standard value segment.
